epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Office BP ≥140/90 mmHg confirmed on multiple visits; ambulatory BP monitoring (ABPM) ≥130/80 mmHg (per ESC/ESH guidelines)

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Harmonized ESC/ESH guidelines; routine ABPM in many countries
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: First-line combination therapy (ACE inhibitor/ARB + calcium channel blocker or diuretic); single-pill combinations preferred
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Control rate disparities between Western (60%) and Eastern EU (35%); medication adherence
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Excellent healthcare infrastructure; widespread screening; advanced monitoring technologies; strong professional guidelines
